ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Continued To Mar-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelsey Quaranto, via Zoom, for and with Henrietta Currier, Petitioner.

The court questions whether probate code 6124 has been rebutted in this matter. Counsel offers testimony in support of her client's petition with Ms. Currier offering testimony regarding the possibility that she inadvertently threw-out the original codicil. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-17-2006 and the lost codicil dated Aug-01-2022 is admitted to probate. Henrietta S. Currier is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-06-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To May-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
